mechanics.text:
HISTORY
pected discovery in 3024 of Star League-era memory core_ Copies of the core soon found their way t0 each Successor State , leading t0 boom in industry and the revival of precious_ lost technologies varied fields from medicine t0 military hard" ware Calm settled over the Inner Sphere_ as the constant war fare  between Its nations shifted to the scientific   arena usual, however; the peace was only temporary:
upgrading   training and   loosening the command structure reward personal initiative. In his most controversial act, Theodore signed compact with ComStar; granting independence to sever- Combine worlds in exchange for ComStar'$ Star League-era BattleMechs. Though prepared storms follov, Kurita believed the compact was in the Combine'= best interests and knew he could justify militarily if necessary: On 13 March 3034 the affected worlds announced the formation of the independent Free Rasalhague Republic Despite Theodore Kurita' support; the declaration of inde: pendence touched off minor rebellion within the Combine , reactionary commanders refused t0 pull their military units from the new republic . Theodore declared the reactionaries ronin lordless and sent his own units drive them from   Free Rasalhague. Theodore' troops and various mercenary groups joined the Republic's KungsArme in battle against the ronin; but poor contracts negotiated in haste paid most of the mercenar ies too much money for too little fighting: Free Rasalhague won its freedom_ but its citizens learned t0 loathe mercenaries_ In April 3039 Hanse Davion set in motion the second great wave of his to unite the Inner Sphere under his rule launched two-front attack the Dieron district the Draconis Combine_ The first assault wave succeeded brilliantly; but before Hanse could Iaunch second wave, the Combine counterattacked and threw the Commonwealth on the defen- sive Aided by the Star League Mechs ComStar had provided_ Theodore Kurita gambled with the fate of his nation and won. By attacking the teeth of the Davion onslaught; Theodore made Hanse Davion believe the DCMS was stronger than actually Was By October 3039_ Davion chose cut his losses and make peace_ The War of 3039 accomplished Iittle , save t0 remind the Successor States tne   severe cost of war. few worlds changed hands, but tne balance power remained the same; Aside trom skirmish in 3041 in which the Tenth Lyran Guards took the world of Skondia from the Combine_ the states of the Inner Sphere seemed content rebuild their realms peace, Military readiness and overcharged rhetoric still ruled the day; but Successor States had- least   temporarily grown tired of war. The Inner Sphere enjoyed ten years peace , which ended abruptly on 13 August 3049
FOURTH SUCCESSION WAR 20 August 3028 Hanse Davion and Melissa Steiner held their wedding Terra in the   presence of their   fellow Successor Lords_ At the reception following the wedding; as he fed Melissa piece wedding cake Prince Hanse announced, Wife in honor of our marriage _ in addition to this morsel give You vast prize_ love give You the Capellan Confederationl With those words Hanse Davion launched the Fourth Succession War. series of military exercises held between 3026 and 3028 Hanse had moved vast numbers of troops under the guise of training He had also reorganized his army; regrouping battalions and regiments into Regimental Combat Teams con- sisting of one Or more regiments of BattleMechs plus armor; infantry ad artillery support: This organization gave Davion troops overwhelming advantages. Training; traveling and fight: ing together gave them unusual cohesion in the field, making them far more effective fighting force than the enemy units they faced, 3028, the RCTs   poured into tne Capellan Confederation seven successive waves cutting it in half; Such large-scale mobilization did not come without cost: The vast demand for JumpShips and DropShips to ferry troops across space reduced commerce between worlds to essentia items_ inflicting economic hardship on many planets; In addi- tion_ ComStar opposed Hanse Davion' war and placed the Federated Suns under interdiction_ relaying no messages t0, from or between Federated Suns worlds. Hampered by the inter- diction and satisfied with his conquests, Hanse Davion sued for peace 3029. The battered Capellan Confederation agreed willingly to the Federated Suns terms_ desperate free its scant military resources for use against other enemies Despite Kapetyn treaty; the Free Worlds League had exploited the Confederation'$ weakened state , taking more than few Capellan worlds; hoped survive nation_ the Confederation could no longer afford war with the Davion realm;
ENEMIES FROM BEYOND In that year; while hunting pirates in the Periphery near tne Free Rasalhague Republic , detachment  of the famed Kell Hounds mercenary unit met and succumbed t0 mysterious fighting force on godforsaken planet known as The Rock: Casualties included Phelan Kell; oniy son the Hounds founder Morgan Kell and cousin to Victor Steiner-Davion Hanse and Melissa'$ eldest son. Phelan was Iisted as missing: pre- sumed killed but the Inner Sphere did not Iearn his true fate until several months later. The Kell Hounds deteat was the tirst of many battles lost to the Clans, mighty warriors descended from the long-vanished SLDF.
BKIRMISHES AND PLOTS Between 3029 and 3039 the Successor States ockeyed for power through covert dealings and small skirmishes in Iieu out- rght war: The Federated Commonwealth completed the integra tion of its militaries governments economies and conquered worlds, forming the largest ad most powerful realm in the Inner Sphere_ Meanwhile the Draconis Combine took one Iesson from the Fourth Succession War to heart: overhauled its military; his role as the Combine Gunji no Kanrei, Or Deputy of Military Affairs_ Theodore Kurita took several steps to ensure his nation' safety: He revamped the Draconis Combine Mustered Soldiery;
